---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when ..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Scope & Complexity
- [ ] Trivial (typo fix, config change)
- [ ] Medium (new component, route, or contract function)
- [ ] High (new contract, major refactor, new chain integration)

## Related Issues
Link any related issues or PRs.

## Additional Context
Add diagrams, mockups, or references to similar features in other projects.
